title: Lick 2 inch Bamboo Flat Paint Brush – Soft Bristles, For DIY & Decorating, Sustainable, Bamboo, Professional Flat Brush, Recycled Steel Handle, 2-inch Paint Brush
features: ZERO BRISTLE LOSS: Best-in-class brushes tipped and flagged with a bristle mix designed for maximum paint pick-up and smooth layoff
description: This 2" flat brush is useful for pretty much any painting scenario. The bristle mix is designed for maximum paint hold and a smooth layoff. The metal ferrule is made from recycled steel and will be rust-free. The bamboo handle feels solid in your hand for good control. Need we say more?
